title: Address PR 179 annotate review feedback
objective: Finish PR #179 with a dogfood-proven annotate workflow that is easy for inexpensive agents to execute and diagnose.

in: .agents/skills/annotate executor contract and thin Make entrypoint
PR #179 review follow-up state and validation evidence
out: semantic annotation quality comparison between models

context_files.purpose: Annotate task, version, and render contract

decisions.summary: Keep study.txt as an additional rendered artifact.
decisions.reason: The user confirmed a separate study output is acceptable.

decisions.summary: Keep producer-priority selection; semantic quality comparison is deferred.
decisions.reason: Quality comparison is a real gap but does not block the current PR.

decisions.summary: Address exactly the four unresolved P2 threads on PR #179.
decisions.reason: The user explicitly limited this follow-up to the existing P2 findings.

decisions.summary: Dogfood 27417304 on the current branch before declaring the annotate slice complete.
decisions.reason: The real Composer 2.5 TSV exposed a source-owned-parentheses violation that unit tests alone did not reveal.

plan.title: Fix the four unresolved PR #179 P2 findings
acceptance: Full producer names containing dots are preserved and tested.
Repeated finish with identical selections keeps the annotate ref stable and is tested.
Full-width annotation parentheses are accepted and tested.
Source-owned parenthesized text cannot be changed or removed and is tested.
The full 470+ translation test baseline and repository validation pass.

plan.title: Publish the review fixes to PR #179
acceptance: The fix commit is pushed to feat/annotate-pipeline.
PR #179 reports the updated head and CI is green.
The four addressed review threads are summarized for handoff.

plan.title: Make annotate replay deterministic and failures self-diagnosing
acceptance: The skill explicitly protects source-owned parentheses with a concrete example.
Annotate finish returns failed segment details and exits nonzero when unresolved.
Replaying the same job, TSV, and producer creates no new attestation or version.
A thin Make entrypoint reduces repeated workspace path arguments.
The full translation test baseline and 27417304 dogfood pass.
